feed.title: liammulh.github.io
feed.subtitle: Liam Mulhall's blog on software engineering, computer science, mathematics, writing, and anything else that floats his boat

entry.title: John Ousterhout, a computer science professor at Stanford and (amongst other things) creator of Tcl and Tk, wrote a book expounding his software design philosophy. I provide a brief overview of the book before I give my impressions and takeaways.
entry.summary: John Ousterhout, a computer science professor at Stanford and (amongst other things) creator of Tcl and Tk, wrote a book expounding his software design philosophy. I provide a brief overview of the book before I give my impressions and takeaways.
